_meta.last_updated_by: claude-code per Founder directive 2026-05-14 PER-SHIP TOKEN ATTRIBUTION
_meta.notes: Anthropic per-million-token pricing. Update when Anthropic publishes new model tiers or pricing changes. The dashboard footer surfaces this last_updated so Founder can audit freshness.

input_output_split_assumption.rationale: Orchestration sessions are read-heavy: large context windows + tool results dominate token cost; LLM-emitted output is a smaller fraction. 85/15 input/output split is the operator-asserted estimate for session.team-work.summary events that don't carry a per-call input/output breakdown. When real per-call data is available (post-instrumentation), this assumption is bypassed.
